infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Show nearby photoshoot spots and save locations.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Upload photos for your photoshoot spots.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Save spot photos to your camera roll.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Capture photos for your photoshoot spots.
infoPlist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: We use this to improve LumaScout recommendations and personalization.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow LumaScout to use your location to find nearby spots.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow LumaScout to access your photos to upload spot images.

plugins._comment: Apr 2026 — switched to the full-bleed LumaScout splash. resizeMode='cover' guarantees the image fills the entire screen on every aspect ratio (iPhone SE through iPhone 15 Pro Max, foldables, tablets) without letterboxing. Background matches the navy in the artwork so any sub-pixel edge band blends seamlessly.
